scores.correctness_notes: Mostly correct but has inaccuracies: gold standard shows multi-base uses format 'ubuntu@22.04:amd64' (colon separator) not 'ubuntu@22.04-amd64' (dash separator) in shorthand form. Also the 'devel' base should be specified as 'ubuntu@devel' as build-base. The legacy 'bases' key approach is not mentioned in gold standard and may be adding unrequested info.
scores.hallucination_notes: The platform key format 'ubuntu@22.04-amd64' uses dash separator but gold standard shows 'ubuntu@22.04:amd64' with colon. The 'riscv64' is listed as supported arch (it is cross-compilable but gold standard lists supported as: amd64, arm64, armhf, ppc64el, s390x). Minor inaccuracies rather than full hallucinations.
